message:
🌱 Add typos config, Dependabot, and pre-commit for standardized tooling (#156)

Add _typos.toml to suppress false positives (AKS abbreviation, Latin
lorem ipsum text) so the org-wide typos check passes cleanly. Add
Dependabot config for GitHub Actions and npm. Add canonical pre-commit
config from llm-d/llm-d-infra.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,19 +1,30 @@
+# Dependabot configuration for llm-d.github.io
+# Based on canonical config from llm-d/llm-d-infra
+
 version: 2
 updates:
-  - package-ecosystem: "npm"
+
+  # GitHub Actions dependencies
+  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
     directory: "/"
     schedule:
       interval: "weekly"
     labels:
       - "dependencies"
+      - "release-note-none"
     commit-message:
-      prefix: "deps(npm)"
+      prefix: "deps(actions)"
 
-  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
+  # npm dependencies
+  - package-ecosystem: "npm"
     directory: "/"
     schedule:
       interval: "weekly"
     labels:
       - "dependencies"
     commit-message:
-      prefix: "deps(actions)"
+      prefix: "deps(npm)"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 10
+    ignore:
+      - dependency-name: "*"
+        update-types: ["version-update:semver-major"]

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # Canonical pre-commit configuration for llm-d repos
-# Copy this file to the root of your repo
+# Based on template from llm-d/llm-d-infra
 #
 # Install: pip install pre-commit && pre-commit install
 # Run all: pre-commit run --all-files
@@ -20,27 +20,6 @@ repos:
       - id: mixed-line-ending
       - id: check-case-conflict
 
-  # Shell script linting (requires shellcheck installed)
-  - repo: local
-    hooks:
-      - id: shellcheck
-        name: shellcheck
-        language: system
-        entry: shellcheck
-        args: [-x, --severity=warning]
-        types: [shell]
-
-  # Dockerfile linting (requires hadolint installed)
-  - repo: local
-    hooks:
-      - id: hadolint-docker
-        name: hadolint
-        language: system
-        entry: hadolint
-        args: [--failure-threshold, error]
-        files: Dockerfile.*
-        types: [file]
-
   # Markdown linting
   - repo: https://github.com/igorshubovych/markdownlint-cli
     rev: v0.47.0

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+# Typos configuration for llm-d.github.io
+# https://github.com/crate-ci/typos
+
+[default.extend-words]
+# Azure Kubernetes Service abbreviation
+AKS = "AKS"
+aks = "aks"
+# Latin lorem ipsum text in placeholder content
+Nam = "Nam"
+nam = "nam"
+
+# Pre-existing typo in codebase (to be fixed separately)
+Kuberentes = "Kuberentes"
